title: orchis pinguicula
intro: Orchis pinguicula, also known as the butterfly orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of orchis pinguicula include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and treating kidney stones. In herbal preparations, the roots of orchis pinguicula are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
